**auth.py:** login, logout, refresh_token (excluding renew_session which is deprecated and _hash_password which is private)
**billing.py:** charge, refund_full (excluding reimburse which is deprecated and _audit_log which is private)
**cache.py:** delete, get, invalidate, set (excluding flush which is deprecated)
**metrics.py:** record, snapshot (excluding _internal_tick which is private)
**storage.py:** delete, get, put (excluding _validate_bucket which is private)
**worker.py:** enqueue, status (excluding batch_enqueue which is deprecated and _retry which is private)
